summary: Large mechanical labeling PR that replaced many anonymous func_/lbl_ symbols with known Dolphin SDK and sysdolphin/HSD names across 90 files. Most edits were assembly callsite/global renames, with matching header/source declaration updates for baselib matrix, camera object, utility, item, vector, and math symbols. It improved cross-module readability without changing instruction bytes or behavior.
what_changed: Renamed Dolphin AR/DVD/OS symbols from anonymous names to SDK-style names, including func_80351010 to __ARChecksize, func_80339F48 to DVDGetCurrentDiskID, func_80337CD4 to DVDClose, func_80336F08 to Read, func_80337018 to SeekTwiceBeforeRead, func_8034507C to OSLoadFPUContext, and func_80345084 to OSSaveFPUContext.

Separated the internal FPU context implementation label from the public wrapper by renaming the original OSLoadFPUContext entry to __OSLoadFPUContext and retargeting wrapper/internal calls accordingly.
Propagated sysdolphin/HSD camera object names through many melee assembly callsites, including HSD_CObjSetFov, HSD_CObjSetCurrent, HSD_CObjEndCurrent, HSD_CObjGetEyeDistance, and HSD_CObjSetOrtho.

Propagated HSD joint/object names through fighter, item, effects, menu, stage, and baselib assembly, including HSD_JObjGetDObj, HSD_JObjDispAll, HSD_JObjReqAnimAllByFlags, HSD_JObjReqAnimByFlags, HSD_JObjRemoveAnimAllByFlags, HSD_JObjRemoveAnimAll, and HSD_JObjRemoveAnim.

Renamed matrix/vector/util functions and variables in headers and source: HSD_MtxGetTranslate, HSD_MtxSRT, HSD_MtxSRTQuat, HSD_MtxScaledAdd, HSD_VecAlloc, HSD_VecFree, HSD_MtxAlloc, HSD_MtxFree, HSD_Index2PosNrmMtx, and HSD_identityMtx.
Renamed math function func_80022D1C to acosf in declarations, source, asm implementation label, and callsites.
Changed many baselib data references from raw labels to named HSD globals, for example HSD_PerfCurrentStat in pobj-related assembly.
smart_moves: The PR treated labeling as a repository-wide propagation task: when a symbol was identified, assembly callsites, global labels, C declarations, and C definitions were updated together to avoid stale aliases.
Using established SDK/HSD naming patterns made the labels immediately reusable for future matching work and reduced the cognitive load in unrelated melee modules that call into baselib.

The OSContext rename preserved an important distinction between public wrapper names and internal double-underscore implementation names, avoiding a misleading direct label on the real FPU load routine.
The changes were mostly one-for-one symbol substitutions with equal added/deleted lines, minimizing behavioral risk while unlocking better decompilation context.
Reviewer feedback explicitly suggested providing a rename table or sed command for future large rename PRs so reviewers can reproduce the mechanical transform locally and compare against master.
decomp_lessons: For broad symbol-labeling PRs, update every occurrence of the symbol across asm, headers, and C sources in the same change; partial renames leave future decomp work harder to grep and review.
Known Dolphin SDK functions should use SDK naming, including leading double underscores for internal routines such as __ARChecksize and __OSLoadFPUContext when evidence supports that role.
HSD/sysdolphin symbols follow subsystem prefixes such as HSD_CObj, HSD_JObj, HSD_Mtx, HSD_Vec, HSD_PObj, and HSD_Index; preserving those prefixes makes callsites self-documenting.
Mechanical rename PRs are easier to review if accompanied by a from/to table or sed script, especially when they touch dozens of assembly files.
Renaming labels in assembly can improve matching work without changing codegen, but reviewers still benefit from an auditable mapping from old func_ addresses to new semantic names.
naming_conventions: Dolphin SDK/internal symbols may use leading double underscores, e.g. __ARChecksize and __OSLoadFPUContext.
Public Dolphin OS/DVD APIs use SDK-style names such as OSLoadFPUContext, OSSaveFPUContext, DVDClose, and DVDGetCurrentDiskID.
sysdolphin baselib APIs use HSD_ plus subsystem prefix: HSD_CObj*, HSD_JObj*, HSD_Mtx*, HSD_Vec*, HSD_PObj*.
Matrix/vector allocation helpers were named as HSD_VecAlloc/HSD_VecFree and HSD_MtxAlloc/HSD_MtxFree rather than generic func_ labels.
Known standard math functions should use libc-style names when identified, e.g. acosf instead of func_80022D1C.
Named globals replace raw lbl_ symbols when a semantic identity is known, e.g. HSD_identityMtx and HSD_PerfCurrentStat.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Apply exact label substitutions in assembly global declarations and all bl/lis/addi references so branch targets and data references remain consistent.

Use callsite context to validate names: repeated use of a CObj routine with a floating f1 field supported HSD_CObjSetFov, while repeated current-camera begin/end patterns supported HSD_CObjSetCurrent and HSD_CObjEndCurrent.
Keep wrapper labels distinct from internal implementation labels when the assembly shows one function tail-branching to another, as in OSLoadFPUContext branching to __OSLoadFPUContext.
When renaming source-level nonmatching/asm functions, rename both the C prototype and the asm function label to keep build references synchronized.
For future bulk renames, provide an explicit old-to-new mapping or sed script so reviewers can replay the transform and isolate any non-mechanical edits.

review_feedback.feedback: Asked that future large rename PRs include a table of renames or a sed command, so reviewers can run the renames locally on master and compare to the PR.

review_feedback.author: r-burns
review_feedback.response: Agreed that this would be a good idea and noted it would make resolving conflicts trivial too.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that add a rename table or sed command for bulk labeling review.
Search for remaining callsites to func_80371BEC, func_80368458, func_80368608, func_80379F6C, and func_80022D1C after PR 503.
Audit sysdolphin baselib headers for additional HSD_CObj/HSD_JObj/HSD_Mtx functions still using func_ names.
Check whether Read and SeekTwiceBeforeRead in dvdlow.s later receive more precise static/internal naming.
Look for follow-up PRs that decompile files made clearer by HSD_JObjGetDObj or HSD_CObjSetCurrent labeling.
